item.title: Edit: I REFUSE TO SCRUFF MY CATS UNDER ANY CIRCUMSTANCES. She will eventually learn to trust me with something like the occasional sink bath if I remain consistent. I’m holding her under her arms, not her neck. I have big hands lol. p.s. I finally caved a
